calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Mental Examination Of Plaintiff David Camarillo
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Mental Examination Of Plaintiff David Camarillo.

Lyft's motion for leave to conduct mental examination is OFF CALENDAR per the moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Mental Examination Of Plaintiff David Camarillo
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Feb-27-18 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Mental Examination Of Plaintiff David Camarillo

Appearances:
Quinton Cutlip, Esq. 415-421-2800 of Dolan Law Firm for Plaintiff David Camarillo.
Erik Weiss, Esq. 415-788-1900 of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney for Defendant Mirwais Achekzai.
Nicole Jones, Esq. 415-438-6663 of Lewis Brisbois for Defendant Lyft.

10:05 am. Hearing is held. Parties are ordered to meet and confer in the hallway.

10:13 matter is recalled.

RULING - ARGUED. Petitioner and Defendants identify the issues being contested. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Mental Examination Of Plaintiff David Camarillo is continued to 2/27/18 at 11:00 am to be heard by Judge Kahn. Defendant's additional papers to be filed by 2/15/18. Pettitioner's Opposition is due by 2/21/18. Reply waived.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
